objective: Return 1 if n is even, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module IsEven
  (defun is_even (n)
    (if (= (math_mod n 2) 0) 1 0))
  (test zero (eq? (is_even 0) 1))
  (test one (eq? (is_even 1) 0))
  (test two (eq? (is_even 2) 1))
  (test seven (eq? (is_even 7) 0))
  (test ten (eq? (is_even 10) 1)))

objective: Return the absolute value of n without using math_abs.
solution:
(module AbsValue
  (defun my_abs (n)
    (if (< n 0) (return (- 0 n)))
    n)
  (test pos (eq? (my_abs 5) 5))
  (test neg (eq? (my_abs -7) 7))
  (test zero (eq? (my_abs 0) 0))
  (test big_neg (eq? (my_abs -1000) 1000)))

objective: Clamp x into [lo, hi].
solution:
(module Clamp
  (defun clamp (x lo hi)
    (if (< x lo) (return lo))
    (if (> x hi) (return hi))
    x)
  (test in_range (eq? (clamp 5 0 10) 5))
  (test below (eq? (clamp -3 0 10) 0))
  (test above (eq? (clamp 99 0 10) 10))
  (test on_lo (eq? (clamp 0 0 10) 0))
  (test on_hi (eq? (clamp 10 0 10) 10)))

objective: Return the maximum of three numbers.
solution:
(module MaxOfThree
  (defun max3 (a b c)
    (def m a)
    (if (> b m) (set m b))
    (if (> c m) (set m c))
    m)
  (test asc (eq? (max3 1 2 3) 3))
  (test desc (eq? (max3 3 2 1) 3))
  (test mid (eq? (max3 2 5 3) 5))
  (test all_equal (eq? (max3 4 4 4) 4))
  (test negs (eq? (max3 -1 -5 -3) -1)))

objective: Compute factorial of n iteratively.
solution:
(module Factorial
  (defun fact (n)
    (def acc 1)
    (def i 2)
    (while (<= i n)
      (set acc (* acc i))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    acc)
  (test zero (eq? (fact 0) 1))
  (test one (eq? (fact 1) 1))
  (test five (eq? (fact 5) 120))
  (test seven (eq? (fact 7) 5040)))

objective: Compute base^exp for non-negative integer exp.
solution:
(module PowerInt
  (defun pow_int (base exp)
    (def acc 1)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i exp)
      (set acc (* acc base))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    acc)
  (test zero_exp (eq? (pow_int 5 0) 1))
  (test one_exp (eq? (pow_int 5 1) 5))
  (test square (eq? (pow_int 3 2) 9))
  (test cube (eq? (pow_int 2 3) 8))
  (test ten (eq? (pow_int 10 4) 10000)))

objective: Reverse the digits of a non-negative integer.
solution:
(module ReverseDigits
  (defun reverse_digits (n)
    (def out 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set out (+ (* out 10) (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    out)
  (test single (eq? (reverse_digits 5) 5))
  (test small (eq? (reverse_digits 12) 21))
  (test mid (eq? (reverse_digits 12345) 54321))
  (test trailing_zero (eq? (reverse_digits 100) 1)))

objective: Count occurrences of a substring (single char) in a string.
solution:
(module CountSubstring
  (defun count_char (s c)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) c) (set total (+ total 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test empty (eq? (count_char "" "a") 0))
  (test none (eq? (count_char "hello" "z") 0))
  (test one (eq? (count_char "hello" "h") 1))
  (test many (eq? (count_char "banana" "a") 3)))

objective: Return 1 if string is a palindrome, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module IsPalindrome
  (defun is_palindrome (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def j (- n 1))
    (while (< i j)
      (if (= (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) (str_substring s j 1)) false)
        (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 1))
      (set j (- j 1)))
    1)
  (test empty (eq? (is_palindrome "") 1))
  (test single (eq? (is_palindrome "a") 1))
  (test yes (eq? (is_palindrome "racecar") 1))
  (test no (eq? (is_palindrome "hello") 0)))

objective: Sum the decimal digits of n.
solution:
(module SumDigits
  (defun sum_digits (n)
    (def s 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set s (+ s (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    s)
  (test zero (eq? (sum_digits 0) 0))
  (test single (eq? (sum_digits 7) 7))
  (test multi (eq? (sum_digits 1234) 10))
  (test big (eq? (sum_digits 99999) 45)))

objective: Read env var KEY, return fallback if empty.
solution:
(module EnvOr
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun get_or (k fallback)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return fallback))
    v)
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (get_or "X" "none") "none"))
  (test present (mocks (env.get "X" "hi")) (eq? (get_or "X" "none") "hi")))

objective: Read env var as int, fall back to default if empty.
solution:
(module EnvIntDefault
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun port_or (k default)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return default))
    (str_to_num v))
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "PORT" "")) (eq? (port_or "PORT" 8080) 8080))
  (test set (mocks (env.get "PORT" "3000")) (eq? (port_or "PORT" 8080) 3000))
  (test zero (mocks (env.get "PORT" "0")) (eq? (port_or "PORT" 8080) 0)))

objective: Read env var and return uppercased value.
solution:
(module EnvUpper
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun upper_env (k)
    (str_upper (env_read k)))
  (test simple (mocks (env.get "NAME" "alice")) (eq? (upper_env "NAME") "ALICE"))
  (test mixed (mocks (env.get "NAME" "Foo Bar")) (eq? (upper_env "NAME") "FOO BAR"))
  (test empty (mocks (env.get "NAME" "")) (eq? (upper_env "NAME") "")))

objective: Read HOST and PORT env, return HOST:PORT, or 'localhost:80' if either missing.
solution:
(module HostPort
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun host_port ()
    (def h (env_read "HOST"))
    (def p (env_read "PORT"))
    (if (str_eq h "") (return "localhost:80"))
    (if (str_eq p "") (return "localhost:80"))
    (str_concat h (str_concat ":" p)))
  (test both
    (mocks (env.get "HOST" "api.example.com") (env.get "PORT" "8443"))
    (eq? (host_port) "api.example.com:8443"))
  (test missing_host
    (mocks (env.get "HOST" "") (env.get "PORT" "80"))
    (eq? (host_port) "localhost:80"))
  (test missing_port
    (mocks (env.get "HOST" "x.com") (env.get "PORT" ""))
    (eq? (host_port) "localhost:80")))

objective: Read a file and return its first character (or empty string).
solution:
(module FileFirstChar
  (extern defun file_read (path) @capability "file.read")
  (defun first_char (path)
    (def c (file_read path))
    (if (str_eq c "") (return ""))
    (str_substring c 0 1))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/a" "")) (eq? (first_char "/a") ""))
  (test single (mocks (file.read "/a" "x")) (eq? (first_char "/a") "x"))
  (test long (mocks (file.read "/a" "hello")) (eq? (first_char "/a") "h")))

objective: Count newline-separated lines in a file.
solution:
(module FileCountLines
  (extern defun file_read (path) @capability "file.read")
  (defun line_count (path)
    (def s (file_read path))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) "\n") (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 0))
  (test one (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\n")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 1))
  (test two (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb\n")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 2))
  (test trailing (mocks (file.read "/f" "hi")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 0)))

objective: Return the byte length of a file's content.
solution:
(module FileSize
  (extern defun file_read (path) @capability "file.read")
  (defun byte_size (path)
    (str_length (file_read path)))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (byte_size "/f") 0))
  (test small (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello")) (eq? (byte_size "/f") 5))
  (test newline (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb")) (eq? (byte_size "/f") 3)))

objective: Fetch URL and return body length.
solution:
(module HttpLen
  (extern defun http_get (url) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun body_len (url)
    (str_length (http_get url)))
  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (body_len "http://x") 0))
  (test small (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "OK")) (eq? (body_len "http://x") 2))
  (test big (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "hello world")) (eq? (body_len "http://x") 11)))

objective: Check whether a file exists by attempting to read it; non-empty content means present.
solution:
(module FileExists
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun has_content (p)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (if (str_eq s "") (return 0))
    1)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/a" "")) (eq? (has_content "/a") 0))
  (test present (mocks (file.read "/a" "data")) (eq? (has_content "/a") 1)))

objective: Apply tax pct to base, round to cents.
solution:
(module PriceTax
  (defun apply_tax (base pct)
    (* base (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun final_price (base pct)
    (round2 (apply_tax base pct)))
  (test no_tax (near? (final_price 100 0) 100.0 0.01))
  (test ten_pct (near? (final_price 50 10) 55.0 0.01))
  (test fraction (near? (final_price 9.99 8) 10.79 0.01)))

objective: Apply percent discount, then tax, round to cents.
solution:
(module DiscountTax
  (defun discount (amount pct)
    (- amount (/ (* amount pct) 100)))
  (defun add_tax (amount pct)
    (* amount (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun final (amount disc_pct tax_pct)
    (round2 (add_tax (discount amount disc_pct) tax_pct)))
  (test plain (near? (final 100 0 0) 100.0 0.01))
  (test only_discount (near? (final 100 10 0) 90.0 0.01))
  (test only_tax (near? (final 100 0 10) 110.0 0.01))
  (test both (near? (final 200 25 8) 162.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute tip, total, and per-person ceil-rounded share.
solution:
(module TipSplit
  (defun ceil_cents (x)
    (/ (math_ceil (* x 100)) 100))
  (defun per_share (subtotal tip_pct people)
    (def tip (* subtotal (/ tip_pct 100)))
    (def total (+ subtotal tip))
    (ceil_cents (/ total people)))
  (test simple (near? (per_share 100 20 4) 30.0 0.01))
  (test odd (near? (per_share 53.33 15 3) 20.44 0.01))
  (test no_tip (near? (per_share 100 0 5) 20.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute principal*(1+rate/n)^(n*years), rounded to cents.
solution:
(module Compound
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun grow (principal rate n years)
    (def r (/ (/ rate 100) n))
    (def total (* n years))
    (round2 (* principal (math_pow (+ 1 r) total))))
  (test no_growth (near? (grow 1000 0 12 5) 1000.0 0.01))
  (test annual (near? (grow 1000 5 1 1) 1050.0 0.01))
  (test five_year (near? (grow 1000 5 1 5) 1276.28 0.05)))

(module Shipping
  (defun zone_fee (z)
    (if (= z 0) (return 0))
    (if (= z 1) (return 2))
    (if (= z 2) (return 5))
    10)
  (defun ship_cost (weight zone express)
    (def base 5.0)
    (def w (* weight 0.5))
    (def z (zone_fee zone))
    (def e (if (= express 1) 15 0))
    (+ base w z e))
  (test plain (near? (ship_cost 0 0 0) 5.0 0.01))
  (test zone3 (near? (ship_cost 0 3 0) 15.0 0.01))
  (test heavy (near? (ship_cost 4 0 0) 7.0 0.01))
  (test express (near? (ship_cost 0 0 1) 20.0 0.01))
  (test all (near? (ship_cost 10 3 1) 35.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute BMI = kg/(m^2) and classify into Underweight/Normal/Overweight/Obese.
solution:
(module Bmi
  (defun bmi (kg cm)
    (def m (/ cm 100))
    (/ kg (* m m)))
  (defun classify (b)
    (if (< b 18.5) (return "Underweight"))
    (if (< b 25) (return "Normal"))
    (if (< b 30) (return "Overweight"))
    "Obese")
  (defun bmi_class (kg cm)
    (classify (bmi kg cm)))
  (test thin (eq? (bmi_class 50 175) "Underweight"))
  (test normal (eq? (bmi_class 70 175) "Normal"))
  (test over (eq? (bmi_class 85 175) "Overweight"))
  (test obese (eq? (bmi_class 110 175) "Obese")))

objective: Standard amortization: P*r*(1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1), rounded to cents. r is monthly rate, n is months.
solution:
(module Loan
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly_payment (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (def g (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* principal (* r g)) (- g 1))))
  (test zero_rate (near? (monthly_payment 12000 0 1) 1000.0 0.05))
  (test simple (near? (monthly_payment 100000 6 30) 599.55 0.05)))

objective: Three-bracket progressive tax: 10% to 10k, 20% to 50k, 30% above.
solution:
(module ProgTax
  (defun min2 (a b)
    (if (< a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun max2 (a b)
    (if (> a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun income_tax (income)
    (def t1 (* (min2 income 10000) 0.10))
    (def t2 (* (max2 0 (- (min2 income 50000) 10000)) 0.20))
    (def t3 (* (max2 0 (- income 50000)) 0.30))
    (+ t1 t2 t3))
  (test zero (near? (income_tax 0) 0.0 0.01))
  (test low (near? (income_tax 5000) 500.0 0.01))
  (test mid (near? (income_tax 30000) 5000.0 0.01))
  (test boundary (near? (income_tax 50000) 9000.0 0.01))
  (test high (near? (income_tax 100000) 24000.0 0.01)))

objective: Weighted average of three values with three weights (weights sum > 0).
solution:
(module WAvg
  (defun weighted_avg (a wa b wb c wc)
    (def num (+ (* a wa) (* b wb) (* c wc)))
    (def den (+ wa wb wc))
    (/ num den))
  (test equal (near? (weighted_avg 1 1 2 1 3 1) 2.0 0.001))
  (test biased (near? (weighted_avg 10 1 0 0 0 0) 10.0 0.001))
  (test mid (near? (weighted_avg 80 2 90 1 70 1) 80.0 0.001)))

objective: Split on space, reverse order, join.
solution:
(module ReverseWords
  (defun reverse_words (s)
    (def parts (str_split s " "))
    (def n (arr_length parts))
    (def out "")
    (def i (- n 1))
    (while (>= i 0)
      (set out (str_concat out (arr_get parts i)))
      (if (> i 0) (set out (str_concat out " ")))
      (set i (- i 1)))
    out)
  (test simple (eq? (reverse_words "hello world") "world hello"))
  (test single (eq? (reverse_words "foo") "foo"))
  (test three (eq? (reverse_words "a b c") "c b a")))

objective: Return number of space-delimited words.
solution:
(module WordCount
  (defun word_count (s)
    (if (str_eq s "") (return 0))
    (def parts (str_split s " "))
    (arr_length parts))
  (test empty (eq? (word_count "") 0))
  (test one (eq? (word_count "hello") 1))
  (test two (eq? (word_count "hi there") 2))
  (test five (eq? (word_count "a b c d e") 5)))

objective: Return 1 if c is a vowel (case-insensitive), 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module IsVowel
  (defun is_vowel (c)
    (def lc (str_lower c))
    (if (str_eq lc "a") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "e") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "i") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "o") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "u") (return 1))
    0)
  (test a (eq? (is_vowel "a") 1))
  (test E (eq? (is_vowel "E") 1))
  (test b (eq? (is_vowel "b") 0))
  (test space (eq? (is_vowel " ") 0)))

objective: Count vowels in string, case-insensitive.
solution:
(module CountVowels
  (defun is_vowel (c)
    (def lc (str_lower c))
    (if (str_eq lc "a") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "e") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "i") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "o") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "u") (return 1))
    0)
  (defun count_vowels (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set total (+ total (is_vowel (str_substring s i 1))))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test empty (eq? (count_vowels "") 0))
  (test none (eq? (count_vowels "xyz") 0))
  (test all (eq? (count_vowels "AEIOU") 5))
  (test mixed (eq? (count_vowels "Hello World") 3)))

objective: Reverse a string char by char.
solution:
(module ReverseString
  (defun reverse_str (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i (- n 1))
    (def out "")
    (while (>= i 0)
      (set out (str_concat out (str_substring s i 1)))
      (set i (- i 1)))
    out)
  (test empty (eq? (reverse_str "") ""))
  (test single (eq? (reverse_str "a") "a"))
  (test simple (eq? (reverse_str "hello") "olleh"))
  (test even (eq? (reverse_str "abcd") "dcba")))

objective: Return 1 if parens balanced and never negative depth, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module BalancedParens
  (defun balanced (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def d 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (def c (str_substring s i 1))
      (if (str_eq c "(") (set d (+ d 1)))
      (if (str_eq c ")") (set d (- d 1)))
      (if (< d 0) (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    (if (= d 0) 1 0))
  (test empty (eq? (balanced "") 1))
  (test simple (eq? (balanced "()") 1))
  (test nested (eq? (balanced "((()))") 1))
  (test mismatch (eq? (balanced "(()") 0))
  (test reverse (eq? (balanced ")(") 0)))

objective: Return max of first `size` elements.
solution:
(module ArrMax
  (defun arr_max (xs size)
    (def best (arr_get xs 0))
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i size)
      (def v (arr_get xs i))
      (if (> v best) (set best v))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    best)
  (test single
    (def a (arr_new 1))
    (arr_set a 0 42)
    (eq? (arr_max a 1) 42))
  (test eight
    (def a (arr_new 8))
    (arr_set a 0 3) (arr_set a 1 1) (arr_set a 2 4) (arr_set a 3 1)
    (arr_set a 4 5) (arr_set a 5 9) (arr_set a 6 2) (arr_set a 7 6)
    (eq? (arr_max a 8) 9))
  (test negs
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 -7) (arr_set a 1 -2) (arr_set a 2 -5)
    (eq? (arr_max a 3) -2)))

objective: Sum first n elements of an array.
solution:
(module ArrSum
  (defun arr_sum (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def s 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set s (+ s (arr_get xs i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    s)
  (test empty
    (def a (arr_new 0))
    (eq? (arr_sum a 0) 0))
  (test small
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (arr_sum a 3) 6))
  (test prefix
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 10) (arr_set a 1 20) (arr_set a 2 30) (arr_set a 3 100) (arr_set a 4 100)
    (eq? (arr_sum a 3) 60)))

objective: Return index of first element equal to target, or -1.
solution:
(module LinearSearch
  (defun find_idx (xs n target)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (= (arr_get xs i) target) (return i))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    -1)
  (test found
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 10) (arr_set a 1 20) (arr_set a 2 30) (arr_set a 3 40)
    (eq? (find_idx a 4 30) 2))
  (test missing
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (find_idx a 3 99) -1))
  (test first
    (def a (arr_new 2))
    (arr_set a 0 5) (arr_set a 1 10)
    (eq? (find_idx a 2 5) 0)))

objective: Return min of four numbers.
solution:
(module MinFour
  (defun min2 (a b)
    (if (< a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (min2 (min2 a b) (min2 c d)))
  (test asc (eq? (min4 1 2 3 4) 1))
  (test desc (eq? (min4 4 3 2 1) 1))
  (test mid (eq? (min4 5 3 8 2) 2))
  (test all_equal (eq? (min4 7 7 7 7) 7))
  (test negs (eq? (min4 -1 -5 -3 -2) -5)))

objective: Read env var, return 1 if equals 'yes' (case-insensitive), 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module EnvBool
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun is_yes (k)
    (def v (str_lower (env_read k)))
    (if (str_eq v "yes") 1 0))
  (test yes (mocks (env.get "FLAG" "yes")) (eq? (is_yes "FLAG") 1))
  (test YES (mocks (env.get "FLAG" "YES")) (eq? (is_yes "FLAG") 1))
  (test no (mocks (env.get "FLAG" "no")) (eq? (is_yes "FLAG") 0))
  (test empty (mocks (env.get "FLAG" "")) (eq? (is_yes "FLAG") 0)))

objective: Read env as int, ensure it's >= min (else return min).
solution:
(module EnvMin
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun env_at_least (k m)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return m))
    (def n (str_to_num v))
    (if (< n m) (return m))
    n)
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (env_at_least "X" 10) 10))
  (test below (mocks (env.get "X" "5")) (eq? (env_at_least "X" 10) 10))
  (test exact (mocks (env.get "X" "10")) (eq? (env_at_least "X" 10) 10))
  (test above (mocks (env.get "X" "99")) (eq? (env_at_least "X" 10) 99)))

objective: Read file, return content up to first newline, else full content.
solution:
(module FirstLine
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun first_line (p)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (def idx (str_index_of s "\n"))
    (if (= idx -1) (return s))
    (str_substring s 0 idx))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (first_line "/f") ""))
  (test single (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello")) (eq? (first_line "/f") "hello"))
  (test multi (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb\nc")) (eq? (first_line "/f") "a")))

objective: Fetch URL, treat body as already-formatted status, return uppercased.
solution:
(module HttpStatus
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun status (u)
    (str_upper (http_get u)))
  (test ok (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "ok")) (eq? (status "http://x") "OK"))
  (test mixed (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "Not Found")) (eq? (status "http://x") "NOT FOUND")))

objective: Read two files, return 1 if their contents are equal, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module FilesEqual
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun files_equal (a b)
    (def x (file_read a))
    (def y (file_read b))
    (if (str_eq x y) 1 0))
  (test same (mocks (file.read "/a" "hello") (file.read "/b" "hello")) (eq? (files_equal "/a" "/b") 1))
  (test diff (mocks (file.read "/a" "hi") (file.read "/b" "bye")) (eq? (files_equal "/a" "/b") 0))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/a" "") (file.read "/b" "")) (eq? (files_equal "/a" "/b") 1)))

objective: Return env value or 'guest' if missing/empty.
solution:
(module Greet
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun greet ()
    (def name (env_read "USER"))
    (if (str_eq name "") (return "guest"))
    name)
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "USER" "")) (eq? (greet) "guest"))
  (test set (mocks (env.get "USER" "alice")) (eq? (greet) "alice")))

objective: Build PATH from prefix and suffix env vars; if either missing return '/none'.
solution:
(module BuildPath
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun build_path ()
    (def a (env_read "BASE"))
    (def b (env_read "SUB"))
    (if (str_eq a "") (return "/none"))
    (if (str_eq b "") (return "/none"))
    (str_concat a (str_concat "/" b)))
  (test both (mocks (env.get "BASE" "/usr") (env.get "SUB" "local")) (eq? (build_path) "/usr/local"))
  (test missing_a (mocks (env.get "BASE" "") (env.get "SUB" "x")) (eq? (build_path) "/none"))
  (test missing_b (mocks (env.get "BASE" "/x") (env.get "SUB" "")) (eq? (build_path) "/none")))

objective: Fetch URL, return first space-separated word.
solution:
(module HttpFirstWord
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun first_word (u)
    (def b (http_get u))
    (def parts (str_split b " "))
    (arr_get parts 0))
  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (first_word "http://x") ""))
  (test one (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "hello")) (eq? (first_word "http://x") "hello"))
  (test multi (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "hello world foo")) (eq? (first_word "http://x") "hello")))

objective: Count occurrences of a character in a file.
solution:
(module CountInFile
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun count_char_file (p c)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) c) (set total (+ total 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (count_char_file "/f" "x") 0))
  (test none (mocks (file.read "/f" "abc")) (eq? (count_char_file "/f" "x") 0))
  (test multi (mocks (file.read "/f" "banana")) (eq? (count_char_file "/f" "a") 3)))

objective: Hours up to 40 paid at rate; over 40 at 1.5x rate. Subtract FICA 7.65%.
solution:
(module Paycheck
  (defun gross (hours rate)
    (if (<= hours 40) (return (* hours rate)))
    (+ (* 40 rate) (* (- hours 40) (* rate 1.5))))
  (defun fica (g)
    (* g 0.0765))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun net_pay (hours rate)
    (def g (gross hours rate))
    (round2 (- g (fica g))))
  (test no_ot (near? (net_pay 40 20) 738.8 0.05))
  (test ot (near? (net_pay 50 20) 1015.85 0.05))
  (test zero (near? (net_pay 0 20) 0.0 0.01)))

objective: Days * daily_rate + tax_pct, with weekly discount if days>=7.
solution:
(module Rental
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun base_rental (days daily)
    (* days daily))
  (defun apply_weekly (amt days)
    (if (>= days 7) (return (* amt 0.9)))
    amt)
  (defun add_tax (amt pct)
    (* amt (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun rental_total (days daily tax)
    (def b (base_rental days daily))
    (def d (apply_weekly b days))
    (round2 (add_tax d tax)))
  (test short (near? (rental_total 3 50 0) 150.0 0.01))
  (test week (near? (rental_total 7 50 0) 315.0 0.01))
  (test with_tax (near? (rental_total 3 100 10) 330.0 0.01))
  (test long_with_tax (near? (rental_total 7 100 10) 693.0 0.01)))

objective: Average four grades after dropping the lowest, return letter grade.
solution:
(module GradeAvg
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (def m a)
    (if (< b m) (set m b))
    (if (< c m) (set m c))
    (if (< d m) (set m d))
    m)
  (defun avg_drop_lowest (a b c d)
    (def lo (min4 a b c d))
    (/ (- (+ a b c d) lo) 3))
  (defun letter (avg)
    (if (>= avg 90) (return "A"))
    (if (>= avg 80) (return "B"))
    (if (>= avg 70) (return "C"))
    (if (>= avg 60) (return "D"))
    "F")
  (defun grade (a b c d)
    (letter (avg_drop_lowest a b c d)))
  (test perfect (eq? (grade 100 100 100 100) "A"))
  (test mixed (eq? (grade 95 88 72 60) "B"))
  (test low_drop (eq? (grade 80 80 80 0) "B"))
  (test fail (eq? (grade 60 55 50 45) "F")))

objective: Cart total = sum of price*qty, then tax.
solution:
(module Cart
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun line_total (price qty)
    (* price qty))
  (defun add_tax (amt pct)
    (* amt (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun cart_total (p1 q1 p2 q2 tax)
    (def sub (+ (line_total p1 q1) (line_total p2 q2)))
    (round2 (add_tax sub tax)))
  (test empty (near? (cart_total 0 0 0 0 0) 0.0 0.01))
  (test simple (near? (cart_total 10 2 5 4 0) 40.0 0.01))
  (test taxed (near? (cart_total 10 2 5 4 10) 44.0 0.01)))

(module Electric
  (defun min2 (a b)
    (if (< a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun max2 (a b)
    (if (> a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun bill (kwh)
    (def t1 (* (min2 kwh 500) 0.10))
    (def t2 (* (max2 0 (- kwh 500)) 0.20))
    (+ t1 t2))
  (test zero (near? (bill 0) 0.0 0.01))
  (test in_t1 (near? (bill 200) 20.0 0.01))
  (test boundary (near? (bill 500) 50.0 0.01))
  (test t2 (near? (bill 800) 110.0 0.01)))

objective: Distance / mpg * price_per_gallon, round.
solution:
(module FuelCost
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun trip_cost (miles mpg price)
    (def gallons (/ miles mpg))
    (round2 (* gallons price)))
  (test simple (near? (trip_cost 100 25 4) 16.0 0.01))
  (test long (near? (trip_cost 500 20 5) 125.0 0.01))
  (test fraction (near? (trip_cost 333 25 3.5) 46.62 0.05)))

objective: Classify age into Child/Teen/Adult/Senior.
solution:
(module AgeClass
  (defun classify (age)
    (if (< age 13) (return "Child"))
    (if (< age 20) (return "Teen"))
    (if (< age 65) (return "Adult"))
    "Senior")
  (test child (eq? (classify 5) "Child"))
  (test teen (eq? (classify 15) "Teen"))
  (test adult (eq? (classify 30) "Adult"))
  (test senior (eq? (classify 70) "Senior")))

(module Speed

  (test slow (near? (mph 30 1) 30.0 0.01))

  (test fraction (near? (mph 100 3) 33.33 0.01)))

objective: $10/unit, 10% off if buying 10+, 20% off if 50+.
solution:
(module BulkDisc
  (defun discount (qty)
    (if (>= qty 50) (return 0.20))
    (if (>= qty 10) (return 0.10))
    0)
  (defun price (qty)
    (def base (* qty 10))
    (def d (discount qty))
    (* base (- 1 d)))
  (test small (near? (price 5) 50.0 0.01))
  (test ten (near? (price 10) 90.0 0.01))
  (test fifty (near? (price 50) 400.0 0.01))
  (test big (near? (price 100) 800.0 0.01)))

objective: Base $100, +50% if young driver (<25), +20% per accident.
solution:
(module Insurance
  (defun premium (age accidents)
    (def base 100)
    (def young_factor (if (< age 25) 1.5 1.0))
    (def acc_factor (+ 1 (* accidents 0.20)))
    (* base (* young_factor acc_factor)))
  (test clean_old (near? (premium 40 0) 100.0 0.01))
  (test young_clean (near? (premium 22 0) 150.0 0.01))
  (test old_one_acc (near? (premium 40 1) 120.0 0.01))
  (test young_two_acc (near? (premium 22 2) 210.0 0.01)))

objective: Greatest common divisor via Euclid's algorithm.
solution:
(module Gcd
  (defun gcd (a b)
    (def x a)
    (def y b)
    (while (> y 0)
      (def t y)
      (set y (math_mod x y))
      (set x t))
    x)
  (test simple (eq? (gcd 12 8) 4))
  (test prime (eq? (gcd 7 13) 1))
  (test same (eq? (gcd 9 9) 9))
  (test one_zero (eq? (gcd 5 0) 5)))

objective: Least common multiple via gcd.
solution:
(module Lcm
  (defun gcd (a b)
    (def x a)
    (def y b)
    (while (> y 0)
      (def t y)
      (set y (math_mod x y))
      (set x t))
    x)
  (defun lcm (a b)
    (/ (* a b) (gcd a b)))
  (test simple (eq? (lcm 4 6) 12))
  (test prime (eq? (lcm 3 5) 15))
  (test same (eq? (lcm 7 7) 7)))

objective: Trial-division primality up to sqrt(n).
solution:
(module IsPrime
  (defun is_prime (n)
    (if (< n 2) (return 0))
    (if (= n 2) (return 1))
    (if (= (math_mod n 2) 0) (return 0))
    (def i 3)
    (def b (math_floor (math_sqrt n)))
    (while (<= i b)
      (if (= (math_mod n i) 0) (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 2)))
    1)
  (test two (eq? (is_prime 2) 1))
  (test three (eq? (is_prime 3) 1))
  (test four (eq? (is_prime 4) 0))
  (test seventeen (eq? (is_prime 17) 1))
  (test ninety_one (eq? (is_prime 91) 0)))

objective: Iterative Fibonacci.
solution:
(module Fib
  (defun fib (n)
    (if (< n 2) (return n))
    (def a 0)
    (def b 1)
    (def i 2)
    (while (<= i n)
      (def t (+ a b))
      (set a b)
      (set b t)
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    b)
  (test zero (eq? (fib 0) 0))
  (test one (eq? (fib 1) 1))
  (test two (eq? (fib 2) 1))
  (test ten (eq? (fib 10) 55))
  (test fifteen (eq? (fib 15) 610)))

objective: Number of steps for Collatz sequence to reach 1.
solution:
(module Collatz
  (defun collatz_steps (n)
    (def steps 0)
    (def x n)
    (while (> x 1)
      (if (= (math_mod x 2) 0) (set x (/ x 2)) (set x (+ (* x 3) 1)))
      (set steps (+ steps 1)))
    steps)
  (test one (eq? (collatz_steps 1) 0))
  (test two (eq? (collatz_steps 2) 1))
  (test six (eq? (collatz_steps 6) 8))
  (test twenty_seven (eq? (collatz_steps 27) 111)))

objective: Repeated digit sum until single digit.
solution:
(module DigitalRoot
  (defun digit_sum (n)
    (def s 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set s (+ s (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    s)
  (defun digital_root (n)
    (def x n)
    (while (>= x 10)
      (set x (digit_sum x)))
    x)
  (test single (eq? (digital_root 7) 7))
  (test small (eq? (digital_root 38) 2))
  (test big (eq? (digital_root 9999) 9)))

objective: Clamp integer to [0, 100].
solution:
(module Clamp01

    (if (> x 100) (return 100))

  (test below (eq? (clamp_pct -5) 0))
  (test in_range (eq? (clamp_pct 50) 50))
  (test above (eq? (clamp_pct 200) 100))
  (test zero (eq? (clamp_pct 0) 0))
  (test hundred (eq? (clamp_pct 100) 100)))

objective: Return -1, 0, or 1 depending on sign of n.

(module Signum
  (defun signum (n)
    (if (> n 0) (return 1))
    (if (< n 0) (return -1))
    0)
  (test pos (eq? (signum 7) 1))
  (test neg (eq? (signum -3) -1))
  (test zero (eq? (signum 0) 0)))

objective: Average of three numbers.
solution:
(module Avg3
  (defun avg3 (a b c)
    (/ (+ a b c) 3))
  (test ints (near? (avg3 1 2 3) 2.0 0.001))
  (test same (near? (avg3 5 5 5) 5.0 0.001))
  (test mixed (near? (avg3 0 3 6) 3.0 0.001)))

objective: Uppercase first character of a string, leave rest.
solution:
(module CapFirst
  (defun capitalize (s)
    (if (str_eq s "") (return ""))
    (def first (str_upper (str_substring s 0 1)))
    (def rest (str_substring s 1 (- (str_length s) 1)))
    (str_concat first rest))
  (test empty (eq? (capitalize "") ""))
  (test single (eq? (capitalize "a") "A"))
  (test word (eq? (capitalize "hello") "Hello"))
  (test already_cap (eq? (capitalize "World") "World")))

objective: Read env as int, default to 0.
solution:
(module EnvZero
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun env_int (k)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return 0))
    (str_to_num v))
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (env_int "X") 0))
  (test set (mocks (env.get "X" "42")) (eq? (env_int "X") 42))
  (test zero (mocks (env.get "X" "0")) (eq? (env_int "X") 0)))

objective: Read PRIMARY, fall back to SECONDARY, fall back to 'none'.
solution:
(module EnvPriority
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun pick ()
    (def p (env_read "PRIMARY"))
    (if (str_eq p "") 0 (return p))
    (def s (env_read "SECONDARY"))
    (if (str_eq s "") (return "none"))
    s)
  (test primary (mocks (env.get "PRIMARY" "a") (env.get "SECONDARY" "b")) (eq? (pick) "a"))
  (test secondary (mocks (env.get "PRIMARY" "") (env.get "SECONDARY" "b")) (eq? (pick) "b"))
  (test neither (mocks (env.get "PRIMARY" "") (env.get "SECONDARY" "")) (eq? (pick) "none")))

objective: Check if file content starts with given prefix.
solution:
(module FileStartsWith
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun starts_with_p (path prefix)
    (def content (file_read path))
    (def pn (str_length prefix))
    (if (< (str_length content) pn) (return 0))
    (if (str_eq (str_substring content 0 pn) prefix) 1 0))
  (test yes (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello world")) (eq? (starts_with_p "/f" "hello") 1))
  (test no (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello world")) (eq? (starts_with_p "/f" "world") 0))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (starts_with_p "/f" "x") 0)))

objective: Count space-separated words in a file.
solution:
(module FileWords
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun word_count (path)
    (def s (file_read path))
    (if (str_eq s "") (return 0))
    (def parts (str_split s " "))
    (arr_length parts))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (word_count "/f") 0))
  (test single (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello")) (eq? (word_count "/f") 1))
  (test sentence (mocks (file.read "/f" "the quick brown fox")) (eq? (word_count "/f") 4)))

objective: Read three numeric env vars, average them. Return -1 if any missing.
solution:
(module ThreeEnvsAvg
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun avg_three ()
    (def a (env_read "A"))
    (def b (env_read "B"))
    (def c (env_read "C"))
    (if (str_eq a "") (return -1))
    (if (str_eq b "") (return -1))
    (if (str_eq c "") (return -1))
    (/ (+ (+ (str_to_num a) (str_to_num b)) (str_to_num c)) 3))
  (test all (mocks (env.get "A" "3") (env.get "B" "6") (env.get "C" "9")) (near? (avg_three) 6.0 0.01))
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "A" "3") (env.get "B" "") (env.get "C" "9")) (near? (avg_three) -1.0 0.01)))

objective: Read FIRST and LAST env, return 'first last' or 'anonymous' if either missing.
solution:
(module FullName
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun full_name ()
    (def f (env_read "FIRST"))
    (def l (env_read "LAST"))
    (if (str_eq f "") (return "anonymous"))
    (if (str_eq l "") (return "anonymous"))
    (str_concat f (str_concat " " l)))
  (test both (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "Ada") (env.get "LAST" "Lovelace")) (eq? (full_name) "Ada Lovelace"))
  (test missing_first (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "") (env.get "LAST" "X")) (eq? (full_name) "anonymous"))
  (test missing_last (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "X") (env.get "LAST" "")) (eq? (full_name) "anonymous")))

objective: Base rate * nights, +30% surcharge for weekend nights.
solution:
(module HotelRate
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun rate (base nights weekend_nights)
    (def regular (- nights weekend_nights))
    (def reg_amt (* regular base))
    (def we_amt (* weekend_nights (* base 1.30)))
    (round2 (+ reg_amt we_amt)))
  (test all_regular (near? (rate 100 3 0) 300.0 0.01))
  (test all_weekend (near? (rate 100 2 2) 260.0 0.01))
  (test mixed (near? (rate 100 5 2) 560.0 0.01)))

objective: Plan $30 includes 1000 minutes, $0.10/min over.
solution:
(module Phone
  (defun bill (minutes)
    (def base 30.0)
    (def overage (if (> minutes 1000) (* (- minutes 1000) 0.10) 0))
    (+ base overage))
  (test under (near? (bill 500) 30.0 0.01))
  (test exact (near? (bill 1000) 30.0 0.01))
  (test over (near? (bill 1100) 40.0 0.01))
  (test heavy (near? (bill 1500) 80.0 0.01)))

objective: $0 first hour, $4/hr after up to 8 hrs, then daily flat $30.
solution:
(module Parking
  (defun parking_cost (hours)
    (if (<= hours 1) (return 0))
    (if (<= hours 8) (return (* (- hours 1) 4)))
    30)
  (test free (eq? (parking_cost 1) 0))
  (test partial (eq? (parking_cost 2) 4))
  (test mid (eq? (parking_cost 5) 16))
  (test eight (eq? (parking_cost 8) 28))
  (test daily (eq? (parking_cost 12) 30)))

objective: $3 base + $1.50/mile + $0.25/minute.

(module Ride

objective: Final = 0.4*midterm + 0.4*final + 0.2*participation.

objective: Daily ml = weight_kg * 35, bumped by activity_level (0=1.0,1=1.2,2=1.5).

    (if (= level 0) (return 1.0))
    (if (= level 1) (return 1.2))
    1.5)

    (* (* kg 35) (activity_factor level)))
  (test sedentary (near? (daily_ml 70 0) 2450.0 0.01))
  (test light (near? (daily_ml 70 1) 2940.0 0.01))
  (test active (near? (daily_ml 70 2) 3675.0 0.01)))

objective: Scale ingredient amounts by servings ratio, round to 2 decimals.

  (test no_change (near? (scale 100 4 4) 100.0 0.01))
  (test double (near? (scale 100 4 8) 200.0 0.01))
  (test half (near? (scale 100 4 2) 50.0 0.01))

objective: Compute hypotenuse from a,b and round to 2 decimals.
solution:

objective: Check if two strings have same length (simple anagram precondition).
solution:
(module SameLen
  (defun same_length (a b)
    (if (= (str_length a) (str_length b)) 1 0))
  (test yes (eq? (same_length "abc" "xyz") 1))
  (test no (eq? (same_length "a" "ab") 0))
  (test empty (eq? (same_length "" "") 1)))

objective: Return 1 if string is all uppercase letters.
solution:
(module IsUpper
  (defun is_upper (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (if (= n 0) (return 0))
    (if (str_eq s (str_upper s)) 1 0))
  (test yes (eq? (is_upper "HELLO") 1))
  (test no (eq? (is_upper "Hello") 0))
  (test empty (eq? (is_upper "") 0)))

objective: Return max of first n in array.
solution:
(module ArrMaxMin
  (defun arr_min (xs n)
    (def best (arr_get xs 0))
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (def v (arr_get xs i))
      (if (< v best) (set best v))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    best)
  (test single
    (def a (arr_new 1))
    (arr_set a 0 5)
    (eq? (arr_min a 1) 5))
  (test mid
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 7) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 9) (arr_set a 3 1)
    (eq? (arr_min a 4) 1)))

objective: Product of first n elements.
solution:
(module ArrProd
  (defun arr_prod (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def p 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (set p (* p (arr_get xs i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    p)
  (test small
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 2) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 4)
    (eq? (arr_prod a 3) 24))
  (test with_one
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 5) (arr_set a 2 1) (arr_set a 3 6)
    (eq? (arr_prod a 4) 30)))

objective: Return 1 if array contains zero in first n.
solution:
(module HasZero
  (defun has_zero (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (= (arr_get xs i) 0) (return 1))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    0)
  (test yes
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 0) (arr_set a 2 2)
    (eq? (has_zero a 3) 1))
  (test no
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (has_zero a 3) 0)))

objective: Check if first n elements are sorted ascending.
solution:
(module IsSorted
  (defun is_sorted (xs n)
    (if (<= n 1) (return 1))
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (< (arr_get xs i) (arr_get xs (- i 1))) (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    1)
  (test sorted
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3) (arr_set a 3 4)
    (eq? (is_sorted a 4) 1))
  (test unsorted
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 3) (arr_set a 1 1) (arr_set a 2 2)
    (eq? (is_sorted a 3) 0))
  (test single
    (def a (arr_new 1))
    (arr_set a 0 5)
    (eq? (is_sorted a 1) 1)))

objective: Return 'FizzBuzz' if div 15, 'Fizz' if 3, 'Buzz' if 5, else number-as-string.
solution:
(module FB
  (defun fizzbuzz (n)
    (if (= (math_mod n 15) 0) (return "FizzBuzz"))
    (if (= (math_mod n 3) 0) (return "Fizz"))
    (if (= (math_mod n 5) 0) (return "Buzz"))
    (str_from_num n))
  (test one (eq? (fizzbuzz 1) "1"))
  (test three (eq? (fizzbuzz 3) "Fizz"))
  (test five (eq? (fizzbuzz 5) "Buzz"))
  (test fifteen (eq? (fizzbuzz 15) "FizzBuzz"))
  (test ninety (eq? (fizzbuzz 90) "FizzBuzz")))

objective: Count negative values in first n elements.
solution:
(module CountNeg
  (defun count_neg (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (< (arr_get xs i) 0) (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test all_pos
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (count_neg a 3) 0))
  (test mixed
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 -1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 -3) (arr_set a 3 0) (arr_set a 4 -4)
    (eq? (count_neg a 5) 3)))

objective: Return |a - b|.
solution:

objective: Read env var, return 1 if (lowercase) equals target.
solution:
(module EnvCi
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun matches (k target)
    (if (str_eq (str_lower (env_read k)) target) 1 0))
  (test exact (mocks (env.get "E" "hello")) (eq? (matches "E" "hello") 1))
  (test cased (mocks (env.get "E" "HELLO")) (eq? (matches "E" "hello") 1))
  (test diff (mocks (env.get "E" "world")) (eq? (matches "E" "hello") 0)))

objective: Read env as int. If <min return min, if >max return max.
solution:
(module EnvBounded
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun bounded (k lo hi)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return lo))
    (def n (str_to_num v))
    (if (< n lo) (return lo))
    (if (> n hi) (return hi))
    n)
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (bounded "X" 1 10) 1))
  (test in_range (mocks (env.get "X" "5")) (eq? (bounded "X" 1 10) 5))
  (test below (mocks (env.get "X" "-3")) (eq? (bounded "X" 1 10) 1))
  (test above (mocks (env.get "X" "99")) (eq? (bounded "X" 1 10) 10)))

solution:

    (if (str_eq s "") (return "empty"))
    s)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (safe "/f") "empty"))
  (test some (mocks (file.read "/f" "hi")) (eq? (safe "/f") "hi")))

objective: Read env, return 1 if starts with '/', else 0.
solution:
(module EnvSlash
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun starts_with_slash (k)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (= (str_length v) 0) (return 0))

  (test yes (mocks (env.get "P" "/usr")) (eq? (starts_with_slash "P") 1))

objective: Fetch URL, classify body length: <10 = short, <100 = medium, else long.
solution:
(module HttpClassify
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun classify (u)
    (def n (str_length (http_get u)))
    (if (< n 10) (return "short"))
    (if (< n 100) (return "medium"))
    "long")
  (test short (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "hi")) (eq? (classify "http://x") "short"))
  (test medium (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "this is a medium length body")) (eq? (classify "http://x") "medium")))

objective: Read file, return first n chars (or whole content if shorter).
solution:
(module FileFirstN
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun first_n (p n)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (def len (str_length s))
    (if (<= len n) (return s))
    (str_substring s 0 n))
  (test exact (mocks (file.read "/f" "abcdef")) (eq? (first_n "/f" 6) "abcdef"))
  (test less (mocks (file.read "/f" "hi")) (eq? (first_n "/f" 5) "hi"))
  (test prefix (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello world")) (eq? (first_n "/f" 5) "hello")))

objective: Read TWO env vars, return 1 if equal, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module EnvEq
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun env_match ()
    (if (str_eq (env_read "A") (env_read "B")) 1 0))
  (test eq (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "x")) (eq? (env_match) 1))
  (test ne (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "y")) (eq? (env_match) 0))
  (test both_empty (mocks (env.get "A" "") (env.get "B" "")) (eq? (env_match) 1)))

objective: Read file, return content after first newline (or empty if no newline).
solution:
(module StripFirstLine
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun strip (p)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (def idx (str_index_of s "\n"))
    (if (= idx -1) (return ""))
    (str_substring s (+ idx 1) (- (str_length s) (+ idx 1))))
  (test no_nl (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello")) (eq? (strip "/f") ""))
  (test single_nl (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb")) (eq? (strip "/f") "b"))
  (test multi (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb\nc")) (eq? (strip "/f") "b\nc")))

objective: Compose: triple, add 7, halve. Round to 2.

    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))

  (test zero (near? (pipeline 0) 3.5 0.01))

objective: Monthly $10. 10 months prepay = 10% off; 12 months = 20% off.
solution:
(module Sub
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun discount_pct (months)
    (if (>= months 12) (return 20))
    (if (>= months 10) (return 10))
    0)
  (defun cost (months)
    (def base (* months 10))
    (def d (discount_pct months))
    (round2 (* base (- 1 (/ d 100)))))
  (test one (near? (cost 1) 10.0 0.01))
  (test five (near? (cost 5) 50.0 0.01))
  (test ten (near? (cost 10) 90.0 0.01))
  (test year (near? (cost 12) 96.0 0.01)))

  (defun net_pay (h r) (- (gross h r) (* (gross h r) 0.0765)))

objective: Hours, rate, deduct 7.65% FICA + 12% federal flat.

  (defun gross (h r) (* h r))
  (defun fica (g) (* g 0.0765))

objective: Sum of squares 1^2 + 2^2 + ... + n^2.
solution:
(module SumSquares
  (defun sum_squares (n)
    (def i 1)
    (def s 0)
    (while (<= i n)
      (set s (+ s (* i i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    s)
  (test zero (eq? (sum_squares 0) 0))
  (test one (eq? (sum_squares 1) 1))
  (test five (eq? (sum_squares 5) 55))
  (test ten (eq? (sum_squares 10) 385)))

objective: Largest prime factor of n.
solution:
(module LPF
  (defun largest_prime_factor (n)
    (def x n)
    (def f 2)
    (def best 1)
    (while (<= (* f f) x)
      (while (= (math_mod x f) 0)
        (set best f)
        (set x (/ x f)))
      (set f (+ f 1)))
    (if (> x 1) (set best x))
    best)
  (test six (eq? (largest_prime_factor 6) 3))
  (test thirteen (eq? (largest_prime_factor 13) 13))
  (test hundred (eq? (largest_prime_factor 100) 5)))

objective: Leap year per Gregorian rules.
solution:
(module Leap
  (defun is_leap (y)

objective: Approximate sigmoid: 1/(1+e^(-x)) where e=2.71828.
solution:
(module Sigmoid
  (defun sigmoid (x)
    (/ 1 (+ 1 (math_pow 2.71828 (- 0 x)))))
  (test zero (near? (sigmoid 0) 0.5 0.01))
  (test pos (near? (sigmoid 1) 0.7311 0.01))
  (test neg (near? (sigmoid -1) 0.2689 0.01)))

objective: Read three env vars, return concatenation, '-' separator. If any missing return 'incomplete'.
solution:
(module Combine3
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun combine ()
    (def a (env_read "A"))
    (def b (env_read "B"))
    (def c (env_read "C"))
    (if (str_eq a "") (return "incomplete"))
    (if (str_eq b "") (return "incomplete"))
    (if (str_eq c "") (return "incomplete"))
    (str_concat a (str_concat "-" (str_concat b (str_concat "-" c)))))
  (test all (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "y") (env.get "C" "z")) (eq? (combine) "x-y-z"))
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "") (env.get "C" "z")) (eq? (combine) "incomplete")))

objective: Read same file twice, concat results.
solution:
(module DoubleRead
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun double_concat (p)
    (def a (file_read p))
    (def b (file_read p))
    (str_concat a b))
  (test simple (mocks (file.read "/f" "hi")) (eq? (double_concat "/f") "hihi"))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (double_concat "/f") "")))

objective: Fetch URL, count newlines.
solution:
(module HttpLines
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun count_lines (u)
    (def s (http_get u))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) "\n") (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (count_lines "http://x") 0))
  (test single (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "a\n")) (eq? (count_lines "http://x") 1))
  (test multi (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "a\nb\nc")) (eq? (count_lines "http://x") 2)))

objective: Read env as int, square it. If empty return 0.
solution:
(module EnvSquared
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun env_sq (k)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return 0))
    (def n (str_to_num v))
    (* n n))
  (test empty (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (env_sq "X") 0))
  (test small (mocks (env.get "X" "5")) (eq? (env_sq "X") 25))
  (test zero (mocks (env.get "X" "0")) (eq? (env_sq "X") 0))
  (test ten (mocks (env.get "X" "10")) (eq? (env_sq "X") 100)))

objective: Read file path env, check if ends with '.txt'.
solution:
(module FileExt
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun is_txt (k)
    (def p (env_read k))
    (def n (str_length p))
    (if (< n 4) (return 0))
    (if (str_eq (str_substring p (- n 4) 4) ".txt") 1 0))
  (test yes (mocks (env.get "P" "file.txt")) (eq? (is_txt "P") 1))
  (test no (mocks (env.get "P" "file.md")) (eq? (is_txt "P") 0))
  (test short (mocks (env.get "P" "a")) (eq? (is_txt "P") 0)))

objective: Fetch URL, return body length excluding leading/trailing spaces (simplified: just count non-space chars).
solution:
(module HttpNonSpace
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun count_non_space (u)
    (def s (http_get u))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) " ") 0 (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (count_non_space "http://x") 0))
  (test all_text (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "abc")) (eq? (count_non_space "http://x") 3))
  (test mixed (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "a b c")) (eq? (count_non_space "http://x") 3)))

objective: Read env as int, cube. Default 0 if empty.
solution:
(module EnvCube
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun cube (k)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return 0))
    (def n (str_to_num v))
    (* n (* n n)))
  (test empty (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (cube "X") 0))
  (test two (mocks (env.get "X" "2")) (eq? (cube "X") 8))
  (test five (mocks (env.get "X" "5")) (eq? (cube "X") 125)))

objective: Read file, split on a delimiter, count parts.
solution:
(module SplitCount
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun count_parts (p delim)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (if (str_eq s "") (return 0))
    (def parts (str_split s delim))
    (arr_length parts))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (count_parts "/f" ",") 0))
  (test one (mocks (file.read "/f" "a")) (eq? (count_parts "/f" ",") 1))
  (test many (mocks (file.read "/f" "a,b,c,d")) (eq? (count_parts "/f" ",") 4)))

objective: Read FIRST and LAST env, concat lowercased with no separator.
solution:
(module Slug
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun slug ()
    (def f (str_lower (env_read "FIRST")))
    (def l (str_lower (env_read "LAST")))
    (str_concat f l))
  (test simple (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "Ada") (env.get "LAST" "Lovelace")) (eq? (slug) "adalovelace"))
  (test empty (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "") (env.get "LAST" "")) (eq? (slug) "")))

objective: Fetch URL, uppercase, return length.
solution:
(module HttpUpperLen
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun upper_len (u)
    (str_length (str_upper (http_get u))))
  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (upper_len "http://x") 0))
  (test simple (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "hello")) (eq? (upper_len "http://x") 5)))

objective: price * qty, plus tax, plus shipping. Round.
solution:
(module Invoice3
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun subtotal (price qty)
    (* price qty))
  (defun add_tax (amount pct)
    (* amount (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun total (price qty tax shipping)
    (round2 (+ (add_tax (subtotal price qty) tax) shipping)))
  (test plain (near? (total 10 2 0 0) 20.0 0.01))
  (test with_tax (near? (total 10 2 10 0) 22.0 0.01))
  (test full (near? (total 100 3 20 5) 365.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute BMI, classify with single letter U/N/O/X.
solution:
(module BmiLetter
  (defun bmi (kg cm)
    (def m (/ cm 100))
    (/ kg (* m m)))
  (defun letter (b)
    (if (< b 18.5) (return "U"))
    (if (< b 25) (return "N"))
    (if (< b 30) (return "O"))
    "X")
  (defun classify (kg cm)
    (letter (bmi kg cm)))
  (test thin (eq? (classify 50 175) "U"))
  (test normal (eq? (classify 70 175) "N"))
  (test over (eq? (classify 85 175) "O"))
  (test obese (eq? (classify 110 175) "X")))

objective: price = base, then 10% off, then 8% tax. Round.
solution:
(module TwoStep
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun apply_disc (a) (* a 0.9))
  (defun apply_tax (a) (* a 1.08))
  (defun final (base)
    (round2 (apply_tax (apply_disc base))))
  (test simple (near? (final 100) 97.2 0.01))
  (test fifty (near? (final 50) 48.6 0.01)))

objective: Simple interest: P*R*T/100.

  (test ten_year (near? (interest 1000 5 10) 500.0 0.01))
  (test fraction (near? (interest 500 4.5 2) 45.0 0.01)))

objective: ROI% = (gain - cost) / cost * 100. Round.
solution:
(module ROI
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun roi (gain cost)
    (round2 (* (/ (- gain cost) cost) 100)))
  (test profit (near? (roi 110 100) 10.0 0.01))
  (test break_even (near? (roi 100 100) 0.0 0.01))
  (test loss (near? (roi 80 100) -20.0 0.01)))

objective: miles * cost_per_mile + driver tip pct.
solution:
(module TripTip
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun base (miles rate) (* miles rate))
  (defun with_tip (amount tip_pct)
    (* amount (+ 1 (/ tip_pct 100))))
  (defun total (miles rate tip)

  (test plain (near? (total 10 2 0) 20.0 0.01))

objective: Apply discount, member discount, then tax.
solution:
(module DiscCombo
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun apply_d (a pct) (- a (/ (* a pct) 100)))
  (defun apply_tax (a pct) (* a (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun final (base d1 d2 tax)
    (round2 (apply_tax (apply_d (apply_d base d1) d2) tax)))
  (test plain (near? (final 100 0 0 0) 100.0 0.01))
  (test cascade (near? (final 100 10 5 0) 85.5 0.01))
  (test full (near? (final 100 10 5 10) 94.05 0.01)))

objective: $30 base, +$0.10/min for first 100 over, +$0.05/min thereafter.
solution:
(module PhoneTiered
  (defun min2 (a b) (if (< a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun max2 (a b) (if (> a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun bill (mins included)
    (def base 30.0)
    (def over (max2 0 (- mins included)))
    (def tier1 (* (min2 over 100) 0.10))
    (def tier2 (* (max2 0 (- over 100)) 0.05))
    (+ base (+ tier1 tier2)))
  (test under (near? (bill 500 1000) 30.0 0.01))
  (test slight_over (near? (bill 1050 1000) 35.0 0.01))
  (test heavy_over (near? (bill 1300 1000) 50.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute monthly payment for given P, annual rate, years.
solution:
(module Amort
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly (p annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ p n))))
    (def g (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* p (* r g)) (- g 1))))
  (test no_int (near? (monthly 12000 0 1) 1000.0 0.05))
  (test classic (near? (monthly 100000 6 30) 599.55 0.05)))

objective: Two-component grade: 60% homework + 40% exam.
solution:
(module WGrade
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun grade (hw exam)
    (round2 (+ (* hw 0.6) (* exam 0.4))))
  (test perfect (near? (grade 100 100) 100.0 0.01))
  (test mixed (near? (grade 90 80) 86.0 0.01))
  (test fail (near? (grade 50 60) 54.0 0.01)))

objective: Standard monthly amortization formula.
solution:
(module LoanClassic
  (defun round2 (x) (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun amortize (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (def growth (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* (* principal r) growth) (- growth 1))))
  (test mortgage_30y (near? (amortize 200000 4.5 30) 1013.37 0.05))
  (test car_5y (near? (amortize 25000 6 5) 483.32 0.05))
  (test no_interest (near? (amortize 1200 0 1) 100.0 0.05)))

objective: P*(1+r/n)^(n*t), with rounding.
solution:
(module CompoundQ
  (defun round2 (x) (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun rate_per (annual n) (/ (/ annual 100) n))
  (defun grow (p r n t) (* p (math_pow (+ 1 r) (* n t))))
  (defun amount (p annual n t)
    (def r (rate_per annual n))
    (round2 (grow p r n t)))
  (test no (near? (amount 1000 0 4 5) 1000.0 0.01))
  (test annual (near? (amount 1000 5 1 1) 1050.0 0.05))
  (test quarterly (near? (amount 1000 5 4 5) 1282.04 0.05)))

objective: Brackets: 10%, 22%, 35%. Cuts at 10k and 50k.
solution:
(module Tax3
  (defun min2 (a b) (if (< a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun max2 (a b) (if (> a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun tax (income)
    (def t1 (* (min2 income 10000) 0.10))
    (def t2 (* (max2 0 (- (min2 income 50000) 10000)) 0.22))
    (def t3 (* (max2 0 (- income 50000)) 0.35))
    (+ t1 t2 t3))
  (test zero (near? (tax 0) 0.0 0.01))
  (test small (near? (tax 5000) 500.0 0.01))
  (test mid (near? (tax 30000) 5400.0 0.01))
  (test high (near? (tax 100000) 27300.0 0.01)))

objective: Full shipping: base + per-lb + zone + express.
solution:
(module ShipFull
  (defun zone_fee (z)
    (if (= z 0) (return 0))
    (if (= z 1) (return 2))
    (if (= z 2) (return 5))
    10)
  (defun express_fee (e)
    (if (= e 1) 15 0))
  (defun ship (weight z e)
    (def base 5.0)
    (def w (* weight 0.5))
    (def zf (zone_fee z))
    (def ef (express_fee e))
    (+ base w zf ef))
  (test minimum (near? (ship 0 0 0) 5.0 0.01))
  (test heavy (near? (ship 10 0 0) 10.0 0.01))
  (test all (near? (ship 10 3 1) 35.0 0.01)))

objective: Total = subtotal + tip; per-person ceiled to cents.
solution:
(module TipDiners
  (defun ceil_cents (x) (/ (math_ceil (* x 100)) 100))
  (defun total (subtotal tip_pct) (* subtotal (+ 1 (/ tip_pct 100))))
  (defun per_person (subtotal tip_pct people)
    (ceil_cents (/ (total subtotal tip_pct) people)))
  (test even (near? (per_person 100 20 4) 30.0 0.01))
  (test odd (near? (per_person 100 20 3) 40.0 0.01))
  (test fractional (near? (per_person 53.33 15 3) 20.44 0.01)))

objective: If amount >= 100, take 10% off. Round.
solution:
(module DiscThr
  (defun round2 (x) (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun apply (a)
    (if (>= a 100) (return (round2 (* a 0.9))))
    a)
  (test below (near? (apply 50) 50.0 0.01))
  (test exact (near? (apply 100) 90.0 0.01))
  (test above (near? (apply 200) 180.0 0.01)))

objective: Cart: line totals -> subtotal -> apply discount -> apply tax.
solution:
(module Cart3
  (defun round2 (x) (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun line (price qty) (* price qty))
  (defun apply_disc (a p) (- a (/ (* a p) 100)))
  (defun apply_tax (a p) (* a (+ 1 (/ p 100))))
  (defun total (p1 q1 p2 q2 disc tax)
    (def sub (+ (line p1 q1) (line p2 q2)))
    (def d (apply_disc sub disc))
    (round2 (apply_tax d tax)))
  (test plain (near? (total 10 2 5 4 0 0) 40.0 0.01))
  (test only_disc (near? (total 10 2 5 4 10 0) 36.0 0.01))
  (test full (near? (total 100 1 50 2 10 8) 194.4 0.05)))

objective: Base $100, +50% if young (<25), -20% if senior (>=65).
solution:
(module Ins
  (defun premium (age)
    (def base 100)
    (if (< age 25) (return (* base 1.5)))
    (if (>= age 65) (return (* base 0.8)))
    base)
  (test young (near? (premium 20) 150.0 0.01))
  (test adult (near? (premium 40) 100.0 0.01))
  (test senior (near? (premium 70) 80.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute weighted, return Pass if >=60, Fail otherwise.
solution:
(module PassFail
  (defun pass_fail (mid final)
    (def avg (+ (* mid 0.5) (* final 0.5)))
    (if (>= avg 60) (return "Pass"))
    "Fail")
  (test pass (eq? (pass_fail 70 70) "Pass"))
  (test fail (eq? (pass_fail 50 50) "Fail"))
  (test boundary (eq? (pass_fail 60 60) "Pass")))

objective: Bonus 10% if sales > target AND tenure >= 1 year.
solution:
(module Bonus
  (defun bonus (sales target tenure salary)
    (if (<= sales target) (return 0))
    (if (< tenure 1) (return 0))
    (* salary 0.1))
  (test missed (near? (bonus 100 200 5 1000) 0.0 0.01))
  (test new (near? (bonus 300 200 0 1000) 0.0 0.01))
  (test eligible (near? (bonus 300 200 5 1000) 100.0 0.01)))

objective: Average 4 grades, drop the lowest of them.
solution:
(module AvgDrop
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (def m a)
    (if (< b m) (set m b))
    (if (< c m) (set m c))
    (if (< d m) (set m d))
    m)
  (defun avg (a b c d)
    (/ (- (+ a b c d) (min4 a b c d)) 3))
  (test all_equal (near? (avg 80 80 80 80) 80.0 0.001))
  (test drop_low (near? (avg 100 90 80 0) 90.0 0.001))
  (test mixed (near? (avg 95 88 72 60) 85.0 0.001)))

objective: Return 1 if n is positive power of 2, else 0.
solution:
(module Pow2
  (defun is_pow2 (n)
    (if (<= n 0) (return 0))
    (def x n)
    (while (= (math_mod x 2) 0)
      (set x (/ x 2)))
    (if (= x 1) 1 0))
  (test one (eq? (is_pow2 1) 1))
  (test two (eq? (is_pow2 2) 1))
  (test four (eq? (is_pow2 4) 1))
  (test seven (eq? (is_pow2 7) 0))
  (test eight (eq? (is_pow2 8) 1))
  (test zero (eq? (is_pow2 0) 0)))

objective: Count chars equal to target c in s.
solution:
(module CountChar
  (defun count_c (s c)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) c) (set total (+ total 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test simple (eq? (count_c "hello" "l") 2))
  (test miss (eq? (count_c "hello" "z") 0))
  (test all (eq? (count_c "aaa" "a") 3))
  (test empty (eq? (count_c "" "a") 0)))

objective: Reverse string by iterating from end.
solution:
(module Reverse
  (defun rev (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i (- n 1))
    (def out "")
    (while (>= i 0)
      (set out (str_concat out (str_substring s i 1)))
      (set i (- i 1)))
    out)
  (test empty (eq? (rev "") ""))
  (test single (eq? (rev "a") "a"))
  (test word (eq? (rev "hello") "olleh")))

objective: Count words split by space.
solution:
(module Words
  (defun word_count (s)
    (if (str_eq s "") (return 0))
    (arr_length (str_split s " ")))
  (test empty (eq? (word_count "") 0))
  (test one (eq? (word_count "hi") 1))
  (test two (eq? (word_count "hi there") 2))
  (test five (eq? (word_count "a b c d e") 5)))

objective: Return char at position i, or empty string if out of bounds.
solution:
(module CharAt
  (defun char_at (s i)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (if (< i 0) (return ""))
    (if (>= i n) (return ""))
    (str_substring s i 1))
  (test in_range (eq? (char_at "hello" 1) "e"))
  (test first (eq? (char_at "hello" 0) "h"))
  (test last (eq? (char_at "hello" 4) "o"))
  (test out_neg (eq? (char_at "hello" -1) ""))
  (test out_high (eq? (char_at "hello" 99) "")))

objective: Longest run of same character in string.
solution:
(module LongRun
  (defun longest_run (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (if (= n 0) (return 0))
    (def best 1)
    (def cur 1)
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) (str_substring s (- i 1) 1))
        (set cur (+ cur 1))
        (set cur 1))
      (if (> cur best) (set best cur))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    best)
  (test empty (eq? (longest_run "") 0))
  (test single (eq? (longest_run "a") 1))
  (test simple (eq? (longest_run "aabbb") 3))
  (test alt (eq? (longest_run "abab") 1)))

objective: Return last fibonacci value <= limit.
solution:
(module FibUntil
  (defun fib_until (limit)
    (def a 0)
    (def b 1)
    (while (<= b limit)
      (def t (+ a b))
      (set a b)
      (set b t))
    a)
  (test one (eq? (fib_until 1) 1))
  (test fifteen (eq? (fib_until 15) 13))
  (test hundred (eq? (fib_until 100) 89)))

objective: Count even values in array first n.
solution:
(module CountEvens
  (defun count_evens (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (= (math_mod (arr_get xs i) 2) 0) (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test all_odd
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 5)
    (eq? (count_evens a 3) 0))
  (test mixed
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3) (arr_set a 3 4) (arr_set a 4 5)
    (eq? (count_evens a 5) 2)))

objective: Read env, parse int with default 42 if empty.
solution:
(module EnvSafeInt
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun safe_int (k)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return 42))
    (str_to_num v))
  (test default (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (safe_int "X") 42))
  (test set (mocks (env.get "X" "100")) (eq? (safe_int "X") 100)))

objective: Read file. Return 'OK' if non-empty, 'EMPTY' otherwise.
solution:
(module Validate
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun status (p)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (if (str_eq s "") (return "EMPTY"))
    "OK")

objective: Standard loan formula with helpers: monthly_rate, total_periods, growth, payment, round2.
solution:
(module LoanFull
  (defun monthly_rate (annual_pct)
    (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
  (defun total_periods (years)
    (* years 12))
  (defun growth (r n)
    (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
  (defun amortize (p r n)
    (def g (growth r n))
    (/ (* p (* r g)) (- g 1)))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly_payment (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (monthly_rate annual_pct))
    (def n (total_periods years))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (round2 (amortize principal r n)))
  (test zero_rate (near? (monthly_payment 12000 0 1) 1000.0 0.05))
  (test mortgage (near? (monthly_payment 200000 4.5 30) 1013.37 0.05))
  (test car (near? (monthly_payment 25000 6 5) 483.32 0.05)))

(module Comp5

  (defun total_periods (n years)
    (* n years))
  (defun growth (r periods)
    (math_pow (+ 1 r) periods))
  (defun future_value (principal g)
    (* principal g))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun compound (principal annual_pct n years)
    (def r (rate_per_period annual_pct n))
    (def p (total_periods n years))
    (def g (growth r p))
    (round2 (future_value principal g)))
  (test zero (near? (compound 1000 0 1 5) 1000.0 0.01))
  (test annual (near? (compound 1000 5 1 10) 1628.89 0.05))

objective: 5-helper tickets: base by age, group_discount, weekday_discount, vip_addon, total.

(module Ticket5
  (defun base_price (age)
    (if (< age 13) (return 10))
    (if (>= age 65) (return 12))
    20)
  (defun group_discount (price group_size)
    (if (>= group_size 10) (return (* price 0.85)))
    price)
  (defun weekday_discount (price is_weekday)
    (if (= is_weekday 1) (return (* price 0.90)))
    price)
  (defun vip_addon (price is_vip)
    (if (= is_vip 1) (return (+ price 25)))
    price)
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun ticket (age group_size is_weekday is_vip)
    (def b (base_price age))
    (def gd (group_discount b group_size))
    (def wd (weekday_discount gd is_weekday))
    (round2 (vip_addon wd is_vip)))
  (test child (near? (ticket 5 1 0 0) 10.0 0.01))
  (test adult_weekend (near? (ticket 30 1 0 0) 20.0 0.01))

(module Card5
  (defun max2 (a b)
    (if (> a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun balance_after (current payment)
    (max2 0 (- current payment)))
  (defun interest_charge (balance apr)
    (/ (* balance (/ apr 100)) 12))
  (defun late_fee (paid_late)
    (if (= paid_late 1) (return 35))
    0)

    (if (< calc 25) (return 25))
    calc)

    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun statement (current payment apr late)
    (def b (balance_after current payment))
    (def i (interest_charge b apr))
    (def f (late_fee late))
    (round2 (+ b (+ i f))))

objective: Drop lowest of 4, average remaining 3, letter.
solution:
(module Grade4
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (def m a)
    (if (< b m) (set m b))
    (if (< c m) (set m c))
    (if (< d m) (set m d))
    m)
  (defun sum4 (a b c d)
    (+ a (+ b (+ c d))))
  (defun avg_drop_lowest (a b c d)
    (/ (- (sum4 a b c d) (min4 a b c d)) 3))
  (defun letter (avg)
    (if (>= avg 90) (return "A"))
    (if (>= avg 80) (return "B"))
    (if (>= avg 70) (return "C"))
    (if (>= avg 60) (return "D"))
    "F")
  (defun grade (a b c d)
    (letter (avg_drop_lowest a b c d)))
  (test perfect (eq? (grade 100 100 100 100) "A"))
  (test mixed_b (eq? (grade 95 88 72 60) "B"))
  (test all_zero_dropped (eq? (grade 100 90 80 0) "A"))
  (test fail (eq? (grade 60 55 50 45) "F")))

objective: Inventory: needed_qty + reorder + holding cost.

    b)
  (defun needed (forecast on_hand)
    (max2 0 (- forecast on_hand)))
  (defun reorder_cost (qty unit_price)
    (* qty unit_price))
  (defun holding_cost (qty days per_unit_per_day)
    (* qty (* days per_unit_per_day)))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun total_cost (forecast on_hand unit_price days hold_per_day)
    (def need (needed forecast on_hand))
    (def reord (reorder_cost need unit_price))
    (def hold (holding_cost on_hand days hold_per_day))
    (round2 (+ reord hold)))
  (test no_reorder (near? (total_cost 50 100 10 30 0.05) 150.0 0.05))

objective: Compute end-of-year savings: contributions + interest + initial growth.

  (defun monthly_contributions (monthly months)
    (* monthly months))
  (defun interest_on_balance (balance rate)
    (* balance (/ rate 100)))
  (defun initial_growth (initial rate)
    (* initial (/ rate 100)))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun yearly (initial monthly rate)
    (def contribs (monthly_contributions monthly 12))
    (def init_grow (initial_growth initial rate))
    (def contrib_grow (interest_on_balance contribs (/ rate 2)))
    (round2 (+ initial (+ contribs (+ init_grow contrib_grow)))))

objective: Convert binary number (passed as decimal) to decimal value.
solution:
(module Bin2Dec
  (defun bin_to_dec (bits)
    (def x bits)
    (def total 0)
    (def power 1)
    (while (> x 0)
      (def d (math_mod x 10))
      (if (= d 1) (set total (+ total power)))
      (set power (* power 2))
      (set x (math_floor (/ x 10))))
    total)
  (test zero (eq? (bin_to_dec 0) 0))
  (test one (eq? (bin_to_dec 1) 1))
  (test ten (eq? (bin_to_dec 10) 2))
  (test eleven (eq? (bin_to_dec 11) 3))
  (test full (eq? (bin_to_dec 1010) 10))
  (test eight (eq? (bin_to_dec 1000) 8)))

objective: Read env, count occurrences of given char.
solution:
(module EnvCharCount
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun count_in (k c)
    (def s (env_read k))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) c) (set total (+ total 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test zero (mocks (env.get "X" "hello")) (eq? (count_in "X" "z") 0))
  (test one (mocks (env.get "X" "hello")) (eq? (count_in "X" "e") 1))

objective: Read NUM and DEN env, return num/den or 0 if invalid.
solution:
(module EnvDiv
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun safe (k1 k2)

    (def d_str (env_read k2))

objective: Binary search on sorted array, return index or -1.
solution:
(module BinSearch
  (defun bsearch (xs n target)
    (def lo 0)
    (def hi (- n 1))
    (while (<= lo hi)
      (def mid (math_floor (/ (+ lo hi) 2)))
      (def m (arr_get xs mid))
      (if (= m target) (return mid))
      (if (< m target) (set lo (+ mid 1)) (set hi (- mid 1))))
    -1)
  (test found
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 5) (arr_set a 3 7) (arr_set a 4 9)
    (eq? (bsearch a 5 5) 2))
  (test not_found
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (bsearch a 3 99) -1))
  (test first
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (bsearch a 3 1) 0)))

objective: Find the second-largest element in array first n.
solution:
(module SecondMax
  (defun second_largest (xs n)
    (def first (arr_get xs 0))
    (def second -999999)
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (def v (arr_get xs i))
      (if (> v first)
        (do (set second first) (set first v))
        (if (> v second) (set second v)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    second)
  (test simple
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 5) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 8) (arr_set a 3 1) (arr_set a 4 6)
    (eq? (second_largest a 5) 6))
  (test sorted_desc
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 9) (arr_set a 1 7) (arr_set a 2 5) (arr_set a 3 3)
    (eq? (second_largest a 4) 7)))

objective: Reverse array in place.
solution:
(module ArrRev
  (defun rev (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def j (- n 1))
    (while (< i j)
      (def tmp (arr_get xs i))
      (arr_set xs i (arr_get xs j))
      (arr_set xs j tmp)
      (set i (+ i 1))
      (set j (- j 1))))
  (test simple
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3) (arr_set a 3 4)
    (rev a 4)
    (eq? (arr_get a 0) 4)))

objective: Count unique values in sorted array.
solution:
(module Unique
  (defun count_unique (xs n)
    (if (= n 0) (return 0))
    (def c 1)
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (= (arr_get xs i) (arr_get xs (- i 1))) 0 (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test all_same
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 5) (arr_set a 1 5) (arr_set a 2 5) (arr_set a 3 5)
    (eq? (count_unique a 4) 1))
  (test all_diff
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3) (arr_set a 3 4)
    (eq? (count_unique a 4) 4))
  (test mixed
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 1) (arr_set a 2 2) (arr_set a 3 3) (arr_set a 4 3)
    (eq? (count_unique a 5) 3)))

objective: Build running max array.
solution:
(module RunMax
  (defun running_max (xs n)
    (def out (arr_new n))
    (if (= n 0) (return out))
    (arr_set out 0 (arr_get xs 0))
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (def cur (arr_get xs i))
      (def prev (arr_get out (- i 1)))
      (if (> cur prev)
        (arr_set out i cur)
        (arr_set out i prev))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    out)
  (test simple
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 2) (arr_set a 3 5)
    (def r (running_max a 4))
    (eq? (arr_get r 3) 5)))

objective: Sum elements at indices i and i+1 for each i.

  (test simple
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (first_pair_sum a) 3)))

    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def out "")
    (while (< i n)
      (set out (str_concat out (str_upper (str_substring s i 1))))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    out)
  (test empty (eq? (upper_loop "") ""))
  (test simple (eq? (upper_loop "abc") "ABC"))
  (test mixed (eq? (upper_loop "Hello") "HELLO")))

objective: Replace all occurrences of char a with char b.
solution:
(module ReplaceCh
  (defun replace_ch (s a b)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def out "")
    (while (< i n)
      (def c (str_substring s i 1))
      (if (str_eq c a)
        (set out (str_concat out b))
        (set out (str_concat out c)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    out)
  (test simple (eq? (replace_ch "hello" "l" "L") "heLLo"))
  (test no_match (eq? (replace_ch "hello" "z" "X") "hello"))
  (test empty (eq? (replace_ch "" "a" "b") "")))

objective: Count digits in string.
solution:
(module CountDigits
  (defun is_digit (c)
    (if (str_eq c "0") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "1") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "2") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "3") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "4") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "5") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "6") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "7") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "8") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "9") (return 1))
    0)
  (defun count_digits (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set total (+ total (is_digit (str_substring s i 1))))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test all_letters (eq? (count_digits "hello") 0))
  (test all_digits (eq? (count_digits "12345") 5))
  (test mixed (eq? (count_digits "abc123def") 3)))

objective: Product of first n in array.
solution:
(module ArrProdAlt
  (defun arr_prod (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def p 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (set p (* p (arr_get xs i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    p)
  (test simple
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 2) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 4)
    (eq? (arr_prod a 3) 24))
  (test with_zero
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 5) (arr_set a 1 0) (arr_set a 2 7)
    (eq? (arr_prod a 3) 0)))

objective: Average first n in array.
solution:

    (def i 0)
    (def s 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set s (+ s (arr_get xs i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    (/ s n))

objective: Items*price + box fee + shipping zone.

(module Warehouse
  (defun items_total (qty price)
    (* qty price))
  (defun box_fee (qty)
    (if (<= qty 10) (return 1))
    (if (<= qty 50) (return 3))
    5)
  (defun zone_ship (zone)
    (if (= zone 0) (return 5))
    (if (= zone 1) (return 10))
    20)
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun order_total (qty price zone)
    (round2 (+ (items_total qty price) (+ (box_fee qty) (zone_ship zone)))))
  (test small (near? (order_total 5 10 0) 56.0 0.01))
  (test medium (near? (order_total 30 10 1) 313.0 0.01))
  (test large (near? (order_total 100 5 2) 525.0 0.01)))

objective: Subscription: tier base + extra users + add-ons.

(module Stream
  (defun base_cost (tier)
    (if (= tier 0) (return 10))
    (if (= tier 1) (return 15))
    20)
  (defun extra_user_cost (users tier)
    (def included (if (= tier 0) 1 (if (= tier 1) 2 4)))
    (def extra (- users included))
    (if (<= extra 0) (return 0))
    (* extra 5))
  (defun addon_4k (has_4k)
    (if (= has_4k 1) 3 0))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly (tier users has_4k)
    (round2 (+ (base_cost tier) (+ (extra_user_cost users tier) (addon_4k has_4k)))))
  (test basic (near? (monthly 0 1 0) 10.0 0.01))
  (test family (near? (monthly 1 4 0) 25.0 0.01))
  (test premium_4k (near? (monthly 2 4 1) 23.0 0.01))
  (test team (near? (monthly 2 8 0) 40.0 0.01)))

objective: Lease: monthly + over-mileage + early termination.
solution:
(module CarLease
  (defun max2 (a b) (if (> a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun monthly_cost (rate months)
    (* rate months))
  (defun mileage_charge (miles_used miles_allowed per_mile_over)
    (* (max2 0 (- miles_used miles_allowed)) per_mile_over))
  (defun early_term (months_done full_term flat_fee)
    (if (< months_done full_term) (return flat_fee))
    0)
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun total (rate months_done full_term miles_used miles_allowed per_mile term_fee)
    (round2 (+ (monthly_cost rate months_done)
               (+ (mileage_charge miles_used miles_allowed per_mile)
                  (early_term months_done full_term term_fee)))))
  (test full_term (near? (total 300 36 36 30000 36000 0.20 0) 10800.0 0.5))
  (test over_miles (near? (total 300 36 36 40000 36000 0.20 0) 11600.0 0.5))
  (test early (near? (total 300 24 36 25000 24000 0.20 500) 7900.0 0.5)))
